violence.message: I cannot provide assistance with harmful or violent content. Please ask about legitimate university services instead.

illegal.message: I cannot help with illegal activities. All academic work must follow university policies and laws.

academic_dishonesty.message: I cannot assist with academic dishonesty. I can help you understand concepts, but the work must be your own.

harassment.message: I cannot assist with bullying, harassment, or discrimination. All university members must treat each other with respect.

privacy_violation.message: I cannot help with accessing or sharing private information. Protect your own data and respect others' privacy.

suspicious.message: I cannot assist with bypassing security measures. Please use official university channels.

misinformation.message: I'm designed to provide accurate information. Please verify information from official sources.
